requirement_topic.en: Litgrid/VERT Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 立陶宛Litgrid/VERT并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 立陶宛Litgrid/VERT併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Lithuania should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to Litgrid (TSO) technical review and VERT (National Energy Regulatory Council) energy-sector oversight. The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Lithuania's 230/400 V 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Lithuania is a Baltic state with a growing renewable energy sector; following synchronisation to the Continental European grid in February 2025, Litgrid grid-code parameters may have been updated and must be verified directly. Commissioning files should document the inverter's firmware protection thresholds and reconnection timing against the current Litgrid post-synchronisation technical requirements.
summary.zh: 立陶宛并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，接受Litgrid（输电系统运营商）技术审查及VERT（国家能源监管委员会）能源监管。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对立陶宛230/400 V 50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。立陶宛是波罗的海国家，可再生能源行业正在增长；2025年2月并入欧洲大陆同步电网后，Litgrid电网规程参数可能已更新，须直接核实。调试文件应记录逆变器固件保护阈值及重连时序，并与Litgrid当前同步后技术要求进行对照。
summary.zht: 立陶宛併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，接受Litgrid（輸電系統運營商）技術審查及VERT（國家能源監管委員會）能源監管。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對立陶宛230/400 V 50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。立陶宛是波羅的海國家，可再生能源行業正在增長；2025年2月並入歐洲大陸同步電網後，Litgrid電網規程參數可能已更新，須直接核實。調試文件應記錄逆變器韌體保護閾值及重連時序，並與Litgrid當前同步後技術要求進行對照。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Litgrid/VERT project grid-connection and commissioning requirements for the relevant installation
VERT electricity-sector approval or oversight requirements where applicable
Lithuania low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Lithuania's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to Litgrid acceptance or VERT project review in Lithuania.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非立陶宛50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为Litgrid认可或VERT项目审查证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非立陶宛50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為Litgrid認可或VERT項目審查證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Lithuanian Litgrid/VERT project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Lithuania-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Lithuania voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. After Lithuania's February 2025 synchronisation to the Continental European grid, verify Litgrid's current post-synchronisation protection settings and reconnection timing directly.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代立陶宛Litgrid/VERT项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、立陶宛专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称立陶宛电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。立陶宛于2025年2月并入欧洲大陆同步电网后，请直接向Litgrid核实当前同步后保护设置及重连时序。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代立陶宛Litgrid/VERT項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、立陶宛專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱立陶宛電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。立陶宛於2025年2月並入歐洲大陸同步電網後，請直接向Litgrid核實當前同步後保護設置及重連時序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through Litgrid TSO and VERT regulatory review for any applicable project approval
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not a Litgrid/VERT approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Lithuanian Litgrid/VERT grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Lithuania's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, and verify post-February 2025 Continental European synchronisation requirements directly with Litgrid before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足立陶宛Litgrid/VERT并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为立陶宛230/400 V、50 Hz电网，并在出货或调试前直接向Litgrid核实2025年2月欧洲大陆同步电网并网后的最新要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足立陶宛Litgrid/VERT併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為立陶宛230/400 V、50 Hz電網，並在出貨或調試前直接向Litgrid核實2025年2月歐洲大陸同步電網並網後的最新要求。
